resource_bank.name: Coursework extension guidance
resource_bank.description: Explains when coursework extension requests may be appropriate and what to do next.

resource_bank.name: Balancing your time at university
resource_bank.description: A practical university guide on managing workload and avoiding last-minute pressure.

resource_bank.name: Extenuating circumstances guidance
resource_bank.description: Explains when serious circumstances may affect an assessment and what the formal route looks like.

resource_bank.name: Academic appeals guidance
resource_bank.description: Explains the formal review route for academic decisions where there may be recognised grounds to raise an appeal.

resource_bank.name: Academic Skills Centre appointments
resource_bank.description: One-to-one academic support for planning, structure, academic writing, and study strategies.

resource_bank.name: Maths and statistics support
resource_bank.description: Support for quantitative work, maths confidence, and statistics.

resource_bank.name: Academic English support
resource_bank.description: Support for academic English, written expression, and confidence with university language.

resource_bank.name: Guild events
resource_bank.description: A lighter option for students who want something that may help with isolation and connection.

resource_bank.name: Self-help guides
resource_bank.description: University-linked self-help material for students who want a quieter first step.

resource_bank.name: Wisdom app
resource_bank.description: A student wellbeing app that can be a manageable first step for reflection and self-support.

resource_bank.name: UBHeard
resource_bank.description: A listening service that can help when speaking to someone feels like the right next step.

resource_bank.name: Book a wellbeing appointment
resource_bank.description: A route into more direct wellbeing support when things are becoming hard to manage alone.

resource_bank.name: Urgent mental health help
resource_bank.description: NHS urgent help information for situations that feel immediate or unsafe.

resource_bank.name: Careers appointments and one-to-one advice
resource_bank.description: Book one-to-one careers support for career direction, applications, internships, interview preparation, or next steps.

resource_bank.name: Careers events and workshops
resource_bank.description: Browse careers events, employer sessions, and workshops that can help you explore options, improve applications, and build confidence.

resource_bank.name: Careers Network overview and contact hub
resource_bank.description: Start here if you are not sure which careers page you need. This page gives an overview of Careers Network and signposts you to appointments, events, opportunities, college-based careers support, and ways to get in touch.

resource_bank.name: Jobs, internships, placements, and graduate opportunities
resource_bank.description: Search for opportunities including graduate schemes, internships, work experience, international opportunities, and other roles aimed at students and graduates.

resource_bank.name: Pathways and online career development
resource_bank.description: Build skills and career confidence in your own time through guided pathways, self-development tools, and online career-learning resources.
